title: Build birthday wish sharing app with candle-blowing interaction

requirements.text: Create a sender form page where users can input the recipient's name and a custom birthday message

quotes: The user inputs his name and the message to be sent to his friend

acceptanceCriteria: Form includes an input field for recipient name
Form includes a textarea for custom birthday message
Form has a submit button to generate the shareable link

requirements.text: Generate a unique shareable link for each birthday greeting that encodes the recipient name and custom message

quotes: this overall setup gets generated in the form of a link

acceptanceCriteria: Each submission creates a unique link identifier
Link encodes or stores the recipient name and message
Generated link is displayed to the sender for copying and sharing

requirements.text: Store birthday greeting data (recipient name and message) in the backend associated with the unique link identifier

quotes: The user sends this link to his friends. His friends open the link

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores greeting data with a unique identifier
Backend provides an endpoint to retrieve greeting data by identifier
Data persists across canister upgrades

requirements.text: Create a recipient view page that displays a birthday cake with lit candles centered on the cake when the shareable link is opened

quotes: a birthday cake with burning candle appears
Place the candles in the mid of the cake

acceptanceCriteria: Recipient view loads when visiting the unique link
Birthday cake is displayed prominently
Candles are visually positioned in the center/middle of the cake
Candles have a burning/animated flame effect

requirements.text: Display the prompt 'Blow the candles!' on the recipient view before interaction

quotes: with the first message "Blow the candles!"

acceptanceCriteria: Text 'Blow the candles!' is clearly visible on initial page load
Prompt is positioned near or above the cake

requirements.text: Implement candle-blowing interaction using microphone input to detect blowing sound
acceptanceCriteria: Browser requests microphone permission
Audio input is analyzed to detect blowing sound pattern
Candles extinguish when blowing is detected
Interaction triggers the birthday message reveal

requirements.text: Display happy birthday message with the recipient's name and sender's custom message after candles are blown out

quotes: happy birthday along with the message that was given or generated earlier by his friend is wished to him

acceptanceCriteria: Birthday message includes 'Happy Birthday' greeting
Recipient's name is displayed in the message
Sender's custom message is shown
Message appears after successful candle-blowing interaction

requirements.text: Design a festive and celebratory visual theme with warm, cheerful colors (avoid blue and purple), playful typography, and birthday party aesthetics including balloons, confetti, or celebratory elements
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette evokes celebration and joy
Typography is friendly and appropriate for birthday context
Visual elements enhance the party atmosphere
Design is consistent across sender and recipient views

constraints: Candles must be visually positioned in the center/middle of the cake
Microphone permission must be requested from the user
Each greeting link must be unique and not reusable for different greetings
nonGoals: Editing or deleting created birthday greetings
Multiple candles with individual blow detection
Video recording or photo capture features

required: Birthday cake illustration with space for centered candles, festive frosting and decorations, top-down or slight angle view (birthday-cake.dim_800x600.png)
Lit candle with animated flame, single candle suitable for placement on cake (candle-lit.dim_64x128.png)
Extinguished candle with smoke trail effect (candle-out.dim_64x128.png)
Confetti or celebration particle elements for background animation (confetti.dim_512x512.png)
